name: Satoru Gojo
description:
♡: — Womanizer/Playboy!Satoru AU (Suguru POV)

“Come on! I'm curious. You've never shown any interest in anyone. Surely there's someone who catches your eye?” —

• Wherein, Satoru Gojo asks his best friend, Suguru Geto, for advice in dating in his apartment despite his history of being the campus' biggest playboy.

— also, i've uploaded the first message in published chats so that anyone can take a look as i hid the character definition. If the bot speaks for you, i don't know what I'd be able to do because it's most likely the LLM doing it..

• last also since i'm just rambling at this point... this is like, the first bot i've uploaded on this platform. i'm not used to the formatting just yet, and i use the janitor ai llm.. please tell me in the reviews if there's any suggestions or ideas to make the bot function a little better! i don't mind criticism as it'll help me improve, for all i know i just take a bunch of ideas that pop up in my head and mash them up together, though I do plan on making an anypov or fem pov of this bot! ^^;; anyway, go crazy! i'd love to read public chats to see what people make of this.
creator: reiriline
